title: AI短剧出海风起时
subtitle: 从内容爆款到全球增长系统
audience: 出海团队 / 投资人 / 内容创作者

imageGeneration.svgPolicy: SVG is only for diagrams, icons, wireframes, template frames, or fallback when image generation is unavailable.

backgroundDecision.reason: This strategy deck uses semantic glass cards and small local decor assets; dense business slides stay clearer without full-scene backgrounds.

spotIllustrations.brief: A small premium illustration of a vertical-drama phone screen with floating payment and region signal chips, no text in image.
spotIllustrations.style: Apple Bento glass, soft dimensional lighting, consistent blue-green accent palette

spotIllustrations.brief: A compact AI localization object cluster: subtitle layers, voice waveform, globe tile, and editing cursor, no text in image.
spotIllustrations.style: Apple Bento glass, soft dimensional lighting, consistent blue-green accent palette

firstThreeSlideTrial.notes: Set required=true for cinematic, story, picture-book, product, brand, or other visual-led decks before completing the full deck.

decorAssets.source: AI-generated PNG in any multimodal image-capable environment, or CSS fallback outside those environments
AI-generated PNG in any multimodal image-capable environment, or CSS fallback outside those environments

sourceSummary.thesis: AI短剧出海的机会不在单部爆款，而在建立可复制的全球内容生产和投放系统。
keyArguments: 短剧验证了竖屏连续剧的高频付费模型。
AI显著降低跨语言本土化和素材测试成本。
竞争会从单点内容转向内容、流量、付费、数据的操作系统。

slides.title: AI短剧出海风起时

visibleContent.lead: 当爽感叙事遇上本土化算法，短剧不再只是内容生意，而是一套可复制的全球增长系统。

slides.speakerNotes: 开场先把判断抛出来：AI短剧出海不是简单把国内短剧翻译出去，而是把剧本、拍摄、配音、投放和付费转化做成一套全球化流水线。

slides.title: 海外短剧已经跑出付费样本

metrics.label: 2025 Q1
metrics.note: 主流短剧 App 海外内购收入量级

metrics.label: 增长区域

visibleContent.insight: 海外用户已经接受竖屏连续剧 + 分集付费的消费方式。

slides.speakerNotes: 这里的数据不用讲得特别细，重点是付费样本已经成立。
